title: begonia edulis
intro: Begonia edulis, also known as the edible begonia or mountain begonia, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Begoniaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and even exhibiting anti-cancer properties. In traditional herbal preparations, Begonia edulis is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can be consumed as a tea or used as a poultice to apply topically.
